nasb.text: “I have made you an assayer and a tester among My people, That you may know and assay their way.”

esv.text: “I have made you a tester of metals among my people, that you may know and test their ways.

cnv.text: “我使你在我子民中作鑒辨和試驗的， 好讓你查察、鑒別他們的行徑。”

ccb.text: 耶和华对我说： “我派你考验我的子民， 就像冶炼金属一样， 好察验他们的行为。
